title: Keke Palmer Gets Strange Marriage Proposal From a Fan While Speaking at SXSW; Taylour Paige Jokes ‘Sorry to This Man’
content:
ByWilliam Earl

WhileKeke Palmerwas on stage at SXSW on Friday, a fan rushed to the stage and asked her to marry him.

Palmer was hosting a live recording of her podcast “Baby, This Is Keke Palmer” with her “I Love Boosters” co-stars Demi Moore, Naomi Ackie, Taylour Paige, Poppy Liu and Eiza González when the awkward encounter took place. The man kneeled on the ground while propping up a ring box on the stage and grinned. Palmer’s jaw dropped, and her co-stars reacted with a mixture of shock and laughter.

“I can’t marry you. I don’t know you. I’m so sorry. I’m so sorry, sir,” Palmer said, which made the audience laugh. When she asked if the proposal was a pre-planned prank, staffers and audience members in the front shouted no, and someone called out, “She needs security.” Her security guard emerged from backstage and a SXSW staffer rose from the audience, both asking the man to leave. He remained on his knees, saying, “She wants to say yes,” and several audience members shouted back, “No she doesn’t.” Eventually, he was escorted out of the event space, with Palmer looking concerned for him and apologetic toward her co-stars and the crowd. “Sorry to this man,” Paige said onstage, laughing and referencing aniconic meme featuring Palmer.

Palmer reiterated that she thought it was a prank, joking that she thought Ashton Kutcher’s hidden camera practical joke series “Punk’d” had come back. She then encouraged everyone in the room to take a deep breath in order to refocus on the podcast conversation, and the audience gave her a round of applause.

“I Love Boosters” was SXSW’s opening night film on Thursday. Palmer, writer-director Boots Riley and the rest of the cast celebrated the film andVariety‘s cover story about Palmerat aparty afterward, where Palmer sang live.
title_zh: 凱基·帕爾默(Keke Palmer)在SXSW發表演講時，收到了一位粉絲奇怪的求婚提議；泰勒·佩奇(Taylour Paige)開玩笑說：「對不起，這位先生。」
content_zh:
威廉·厄爾(William Earl)

在SXSW音樂節的星期五，當克基·帕爾默(Keke Palmer)在舞台上時，一名粉絲衝上舞台向她求婚。

帕爾默正在主持她的播客《寶貝，這是克基·帕爾默(Baby, This Is Keke Palmer)》的現場錄音，與她的《我愛助推器(I Love Boosters)》共演者德米·摩爾(Demi Moore)、娜奧米·阿基(Naomi Ackie)、泰勒·佩奇(Taylour Paige)、劉波比(Poppy Liu)和艾莎·岡薩雷斯(Eiza González)一起進行錄音，這時發生了這個尷尬的事件。這名男子跪在地上，將一個戒指盒放在舞台上，並露出微笑。帕爾默驚訝地張大了嘴，而她的共演者們則以震驚和笑聲作出反應。

“我不能嫁給你。我不認識你。對不起，對不起，先生。”帕爾默說，這讓觀眾發笑。當她詢問這是否是事先計劃好的惡作劇時，前排的工作人員和觀眾都大喊“不是”，還有人叫道：“她需要保安。”她的保安從後台出現，一名SXSW的工作人員也從觀眾中站起來，兩人都要求這名男子離開。他仍然跪著，說：“她想答應。”而幾名觀眾則大喊：“她不想。”最終，他被帶出了活動空間，帕爾默對他表示擔心，並對她的共演者和觀眾感到抱歉。泰勒·佩奇在舞台上笑著說：“對這位先生感到抱歉，”並提到了一個以帕爾默為主題的經典迷因。

帕爾默重申她以為這是一個惡作劇，開玩笑說她以為阿什頓·庫徹(Ashton Kutcher)的隱藏攝影機惡作劇系列《惡作劇(Punk’d)》回來了。然後她鼓勵在場的每個人深呼吸，以便重新集中注意力於播客的對話，觀眾為她鼓掌。

《我愛助推器(I Love Boosters)》是SXSW的開幕夜電影。帕爾默、編劇兼導演布茲·萊利(Boots Riley)和其他演員在隨後的派對上慶祝這部電影以及《綜藝(Variety)》對帕爾默的封面故事，帕爾默在派對上現場演唱。
summary_zh:
